grace_period.source_quote: 12. Grace Period i. A Grace Period of 30 days is available for Renewal of the Policy. Any Illness, disease or condition contracted during Grace Period will not be covered and will be treated as Pre-existing diseases.

free_look_period.source_quote: The Insured Person shall be allowed free look period of fifteen days from date of receipt of the policy document to review the terms and conditions of the policy, and to

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: iii) 30-day waiting period – Code – Excl03 a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an Accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Option 1 General Waiting Period 30 Days Waiting Period for listed illnesses and Procedures 24 Months Waiting Period for Preexisting conditions 36 Months

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: ii) Specified Disease/Procedure waiting period- Code – Excl02 a) Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/ treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy with us.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 4. Pre-Hospitalization cover We will pay for the Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred during the 60 days immediately before Hospitalization of an Insured Person

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 5. Post-Hospitalization cover We will pay for the Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred upto180 days from the date Insured Person is discharged from Hospital

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Medical expenses pertaining only to In-patient care AYUSH treatment are also covered under ‘In-patient Hospitalization expenses’ cover if undertaken in an AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Medical Expenses under Section I.1.A1 for Maternity Expenses limited up to 2 deliveries or 1 delivery and 1 termination or 2 terminations during the lifetime of the Insured Person
